claim_boundary: This aggregate receipt chains script-generated checkpoint-resume probe segments. It proves an accepted damped continuation frontier for the same uncoarsened boundary P-Delta fixed-point operator, but it is not a consistent Newton/Jacobian, material nonlinear, or full-load closure.
